questionHtml:
3.00 mol of C3H8 is mixed with 20.00 mol of O2. Which quantity is present at the end of the reaction?

C3H8 (g) + 5O2 (g) → 3CO2 (g) + 4H2O (g)


A.  1.00 mol of C3H8

B.  5.00 mol of O2

C.  12.00 mol of CO2

D.  16.00 mol of H2O

meta.title: 3.00 mol of C3H8 is mixed with 20.00 mol of O2. Which quantity is present at the end of the reaction? C3H8 (g) + 5O2 (g) → 3CO2 (g) + 4H2O (g) A. 1.00 mol of C3H8 B. 5.00 mol of O2
